rulings.Case Title: LARRY J BARKER VS. ARMSTRONG INTERNATIONAL, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 7, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Parker-Hannifin Corporation's motions for summary judgment, and, in the alternative, summary adjudication are off calendar in light of the dismissal of Parker-Hannifin Corporation filed on July 18, 2018. =(503/CML)
